---
title: "Workshop on Modeling Cognitive Processes in R"
---

[Julia Haaf](https://twitter.com/JuliaHaaf) and I organized a two-day workshop on modeling cognitive processing in R. The workshop covered:

- A quick introduction to [R](https://www.r-project.org/)
- Maximum likelihood estimation in R
- Signal detection theory (SDT) and multinomial processing tree (MPT) models
- Fitting these models to the group and individual participants via maximum likelihood
- Introduction to Bayesian estimation 
- Bayesian estimation of cognitive models using [JAGS](http://mcmc-jags.sourceforge.net/) and [rjags](https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/rjags/rjags.pdf)

The materials for this workshop can be found [here](https://github.com/stephenrho/CognitiveModelingWorkshop)
